name: Texas Crab Grass
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the spinach.
2. Squeeze out any excess water and set aside.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Chop the onion into small pieces.
6. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and sauté until translucent, stirring frequently for about 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the spinach mixture and add the crabmeat and Parmesan. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
8. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart casserole dish (or into a crockpot if desired) and bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or keep warm by stirring occasionally.
9. Serve hot or cold with crackers. This recipe makes approximately half a cup per serving.
